description_long: This object is a metal guard rail designed for urban environments, featuring a rectangular frame with six evenly spaced vertical bars. The structure is supported by two wide, flat base plates that provide stability and prevent tipping. The metal bars are likely made of steel, giving the rail a robust and durable appearance suitable for crowd control or pedestrian safety. The finish is a dark gray, matte coating that resists corrosion and blends into urban settings. The ends of the rail are blunt and squared, with no visible reflective markings or additional safety features. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing function and ease of deployment in public spaces.
description: A sturdy, dark gray metal guard rail with six vertical bars and wide base plates, designed for urban crowd control or pedestrian safety. The finish is matte and the ends are blunt, with no reflective markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full rectangular frame, six vertical bars, and both wide base plates.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the rail and the depth of the base plate.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the vertical bars and base plates.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and base plate depth.
